verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I feel good! I feel good! Just to know I've been redeemed makes me feel good. I feel good! I feel good! Just to know I've been redeemed makes me feel good.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, how well do I remember All the days I've spent in sin With no doubt of doing All the things I should, But then my blessed Savior called me, And He gently took me in Makes me wanna shout "Hallelujah, I feel good!"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm on my way to heaven And i'm singing as I go, I'm so glad my name Is written in the Book! Just to know His blood has cleansed me And I'm ready now to go Makes me wanna shout "Hallelujah, I feel good! '
